textByHash.71574a7084b61971baf439c0525fc9f8a5407eb8: Draw your sword warrior, and fight along side us.
textByHash.10c65acc38f26a362f67f8a1a240eecc6324be4f: Death to Khazard, and all who serve him.
textByHash.fd1dd0dc826c329c3b307fbd7519e4b77eaa6bd5: I can't talk now, can't you see we're trying to win a battle here.
textByHash.af684739ec23ad7d433ac675510f5fdd92525d08: You won't take us without a fight!
